name: ai-session-notifier
description: Privacy-first desktop notifications, best-effort session routing, and bounded local ledgers for Codex and Claude Code.

surfaces.name: Claude Code
surfaces.support: macOS tested; Linux and Windows adapters included and covered by automated checks; field testing is still welcome

platforms.macos: Codex and Claude Code notification backends are tested. VS Code window-focus enhancement uses macOS System Events.
platforms.linux: Claude Code notify-send backend and local ledger are included; desktop field testing is still needed.
platforms.windows: Claude Code PowerShell dialog, bounded local ledger, and best-effort VS Code window focus are included; desktop field testing is still needed. The Codex adapter remains macOS-only.
